title: astragalus commixtus
intro: Astragalus commixtus, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a plant species within the legume family, scientifically classified as a combination of Astragalus and Hedysarum species. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus commixtus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and supporting overall well-being. Astragalus commixtus is often prepared as a herbal tea or capsule, and can also be consumed as a tincture, powder, or decoction.
